name: GEAM — Weighted Matrix Add (UINT8)
signature: void addWeightedTile(uint8_t* in1, uint8_t* in2, uint8_t* out, int32_t tileHeight, int32_t tileWidth, int16_t alpha, int16_t beta, uint8_t gamma);
description: Generalized matrix addition: out = saturate((alpha*A + beta*B) >> 14 + gamma). Supports uint8/int16/int32 via BIT_WIDTH define.
